tools.Name: Composio
tools.Description: A platform for managing and executing modular AI skills that can interact with 1000+ third-party applications.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex workflows like sending emails, managing GitHub issues, or posting to Slack via LLM agents.

tools.Name: VibeVoice
tools.Description: A family of open-source voice AI models including long-form speech recognition (ASR) and real-time text-to-speech (TTS).
tools.Use_Case: Transcribing long-form audio with speaker identification or building real-time interactive voice agents.

tools.Name: Keep
tools.Description: An open-source AIOps platform that provides alert deduplication, enrichment, and correlation using AI.
tools.Use_Case: Centralizing monitoring alerts, automating incident response workflows, and reducing alert fatigue.
